---
title: "Worked Examples"
jupyter: diffeq_py
license: "CC BY-NC-SA 4.0"
---

This page is a compendium of worked examples for MATH 341 *Differential Equations*.

- [Showing a function is a solution](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/examples_01) works through the details of showing that a particular function solves a particular differential equation. 

- [First-order equations](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/examples_02) worked examples for first-order equations including topics such as sketching slope-fields, finding general solutions and solutions to initial value problems for separable and linear equations, integrating factors, and applications to mechanics, population biology, and electric circuits.
